recipes.title: Ginger-Lime Salmon (Gluten-free, Whole30, Paleo, GAPS, AIP, Keto)
ingredients: 1-1/2 pounds salmon (, fresh or frozen, approximately ~ enough to feed 5 people)
1/4 cup sesame oil (OR olive oil: *use olive oil for the AIP and Low-FODMAP versions)
2 to 3 inch nub fresh ginger (, grated)
2 cloves fresh garlic (crushed; only use 1 clove for Low-FODMAP)
1 Tablespoon lime juice (, fresh, or lemon juice is fine)
1 teaspoon lime zest (from an organic lime (or lemon zest))
1 teaspoon raw honey (OR low carb liquid sweetener for Keto and Low Carb; omit for Low-FODMAP)
2 to 5  zucchini (depending on how many veggies you want or how many people you're serving; allow 1 zucchini per person)
1 bunch green onions' greens (leftover from above ingredients (or use an extra bunch for Keto and Low Carb))

recipes.title: Paleo Buffalo Chicken Casserole with Ranch and Cauliflower Rice (Whole30, Low Carb)
ingredients: 3 cups cauliflower rice (preferably pre-riced and frozen*)
1 cup green onions (sliced, plus more for garnish, about 4 total)
1/4 cup Whole30 ranch dressing (plus 2 tablespoons if necessary to coat chicken-rice mixture)
1/4 cup + 2 tablespoons coconut cream (only the solid white part from a can of coconut milk or cream)

recipes.title: Paleo Pork Chops with Mushroom Sauce (Whole30)
ingredients: 4  boneless, thick-cut pork chops, room temperature
fine sea salt, plus ½ teaspoon for the sauce
1 tablespoon avocado oil or extra virgin olive oil
8 oz. sliced or chopped mushrooms, such as button, portobellos, cremini or a mix
1 teaspoon anchovy paste or tomato paste

recipes.title: Salmon Taco Bowls (Paleo, Whole30)
ingredients: 4 (6 oz.) salmon fillets (with or without skin, room temperature)
½ teaspoon chipotle flakes or ground chipotle powder
2 tablespoons avocado oil, olive oil or melted coconut oil
avocado oil spray or olive oil spray
Veggies and toppings  ((see note below for ideas))

recipes.title: Spicy Pork Bowls (Paleo, Whole30 + Low Carb)
ingredients: 2 inches fresh ginger, grated on a microplane
6 cups greens ((we used mixed greens - spinach and kale are great too))
6 ribs celery, sliced on the diagonal
2  carrots, sliced thinly on the diagonal
1  bell pepper, thinly sliced ((we used a red bell pepper, but whatever color works))
1 tsp garlic powder ((or sub 1 tbsp garlic oil))
4 cups cauliflower rice ((or white rice if not doing Whole30 or Keto))

recipes.title: Whole30 Instant Pot Chicken Tortilla-Less Soup (with Slow Cooker Option)
ingredients: 2 large boneless, skinless chicken breasts (equally thick, approximately 8-10 ounces each)
2 10-ounce cans diced tomatoes with green chiles
1 cup chopped onion (approximately 1 medium onion; any color)

1 14-ounce can unsweetened, full-fat coconut milk (whisked until smooth, see Notes)

recipes.title: Whole30 + Keto Pork Chops with Bacon Mushroom Sauce
ingredients: 4 8-ounce pork chops (I get my hormone + antibiotic free pork chops from ButcherBox, which I highly recommend!)

recipes.title: Whole30 Marry Me Chicken
ingredients: 4  large boneless skinless chicken breasts (approximately 2 pounds)
1 ½ tablespoons minced fresh garlic (approximately 3 large cloves)
1 ½ cups unsweetened full-fat coconut milk (at room temperature - or coconut cream, or plain Nutpods; see Notes)
½ to 1 teaspoon salt (more or less to taste)
¼ teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes
2 tablespoons fresh basil (chiffonaded for garnish (see Notes))
